title: Battery Aging Law from Cold-Start Lab Cycling - high-cycle heat extrapolation
strategies: constant baseline: predict the mean observed capacity loss from the training cells -> about 0.1
polynomial/interaction fit in cycle count, temperature, depth-of-discharge and charge rate: tracks the local trend but misses Arrhenius curvature and the high-cycle activation

structured electrochemical basis with diffusion-like growth, throughput-rate interaction, and a smooth high-cycle/high-temperature term: fit nonlinear exponents by a small grid and solve linear coefficients

alternatives: robust regression against noisy low-temperature rows, monotone/nonnegative constraints on mechanism amplitudes, or trading a compact mechanistic expression against the complexity penalty
